---
title: "workshop 2"
format: 
   html:
      theme: cerulean
   pdf:
      theme: cerulean
editor: visual
---

## Load Libraries

```{r}
#| echo: False
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE)
library(rmarkdown)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Running Code

```{r}
#| warning: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| echo: FALSE
1 + 1
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
dat<-read_csv("avian_influenza_numbers.csv")
head(dat)
```

```{r}
head(dat)
```

# Introduction

### “In this tutorial we are looking at the "*Avian Influenza*"cases detected globally since 1997.”

[“US CDC”](https://www.cdc.gov/bird-flu/php/avian-flu-summary/chart-epi-curve-ah5n1.html)

```{r}
```
